description: Phase 5 tiled two-pass WHT luma shrinkage (fused pass1 BayesShrink + pass2 Wiener, shared-memory overlap-add) + debug pass1 pilot dump

kernels.dispatch: galosh_raw_gpu.c:1386-1394 — const int o32_tile_size = 28; const int wgd = g_tile_wg_dim; /* 8 */ const size_t tiles_x = (width + o32_tile_size - 1) / o32_tile_size; const size_t tiles_y = (height + o32_tile_size - 1) / o32_tile_size; const size_t global2[2] = { tiles_x * wgd, tiles_y * wgd }; const size_t local2[2] = { wgd, wgd }; clEnqueueNDRangeKernel(queue, k_o32_pass12, 2, NULL, global2, local2, ...)
kernels.notes: Shared mem = tile_in+numer+denom+pilot = 4 x 1600 floats x 4 B = 25600 B (25.0 KiB, <= 48 KB). No float atomics (phase-disjoint block tiling + per-phase barrier makes numer/denom accumulation race-free). Workgroup dim 8x8 = TILE_WG_DIM default in galosh_gpu.h:336 (host uses g_tile_wg_dim; if TILE_WG_DIM is overridden at build the shader local_size and the two hardcoded 8s in lid/wg_size must follow). Mechanical transcription deltas (bit-identical values): (a) wht8_f(block + r*8) pointer-offset row transform -> row copy-in/copy-out (GLSL has no pointer arithmetic; column path was already copy-based in OpenCL); (b) (size_t) global-index casts dropped -> int indexing (npix < 2^31); (c) OpenCL int-as-bool `(px % phase_stride) || (py % phase_stride)` -> explicit `!= 0` comparisons; (d) barrier(CLK_LOCAL_MEM_FENCE) -> memoryBarrierShared(); barrier(). No mad/fma in source; none introduced.; [SUPERSEDED 2026-07-11 (partially, B7g): this entry now describes the GALOSH_SG=0 classic path (OpenCL bit-twin). Vulkan quality default is o32_pass12_sg.comp -- local 512, required subgroup size 32 (VK_EXT_subgroup_size_control), 2 coeff/lane, dispatch grid still ceil(W/28) x ceil(H/28). Sibling o32_pass12_wht4.comp (--wht=4 video-grade) is absent from this manifest.]

kernels.dispatch: galosh_raw_gpu.c:1732-1738 — const int o32_tile_size_dbg = 28; const int wgd_dbg = g_tile_wg_dim; const size_t tx_dbg = (width + o32_tile_size_dbg - 1) / o32_tile_size_dbg; const size_t ty_dbg = (height + o32_tile_size_dbg - 1) / o32_tile_size_dbg; const size_t g2[2] = { tx_dbg * wgd_dbg, ty_dbg * wgd_dbg }; const size_t l2[2] = { wgd_dbg, wgd_dbg }; clEnqueueNDRangeKernel(queue, k_o32_pass1_dump, 2, NULL, g2, l2, ...)
kernels.notes: DEBUG-ONLY: host dispatches only when GALOSH_DUMP_DIR is set (verify_o32_phases.py harness); zero production cost. Shared mem = tile_in+numer+denom = 3 x 1600 floats x 4 B = 19200 B (18.75 KiB, <= 48 KB). No phase_stride arg (always full 16 phases). Source has NO barrier between the tile-load loop and the accumulator-zero loop (disjoint arrays, single barrier after both) — preserved as-is. Same mechanical transcription deltas as galosh_pass12_o32. No float atomics.
